---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement.
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: richar12138
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem is. E.g. "I can't see token usage for [Agent X]..."

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Which agent(s) does this relate to?
- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Gemini CLI
- [ ] Codex
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] GitHub Copilot
- [ ] Qwen
- [ ] OpenCode
- [ ] Vibe
- [ ] Antigravity
- [ ] All / General

## Additional context
Add any mockups, screenshots, or context about the feature request here.
